description: A portrait-format graphic. A blue banner at the top carries the Department of Homeland Security seal, an ICE wordmark, and the heading CHICAGO: Operation Midway Blitz. Below it is a photograph of an adult man with thinning dark hair and a mustache, seated indoors and looking toward the camera, wearing a gray collared shirt. A blue banner at the bottom reads Felony Drug Possession.
notable_text: CHICAGO: Operation Midway Blitz; Felony Drug Possession; ICE
